members.name: HydrationPipeline: empty vectors return max distance
HydrationPipeline: mismatched lengths return max distance
HydrationPipeline: cosine distance — equal unit vectors
Library: insert and fetch ContextNode round-trip all fields
Library: insert target and depends_on edge
Library: fetchNode returns null for unknown id
WasmTool: editable mixin is zero size
WasmTool: reflective get on scalar fields
Library: fetchWasmTool returns null for unknown id
Library: insertWasmTool upsert overwrites existing record
Library: persistNeighborEdges with empty slice is a no-op
Library: persistNeighborEdges single-element slice is also a no-op
Library: all EdgeType variants can be inserted
ContextPacker: selectLod distance 3 always returns name
ContextPacker: selectLodByDistance high-degree gets lower effective distance
Library: KNN search returns top-K hits sorted by distance
ContextPacker: BFS distance → LOD assignment → token-budget downgrade
Library: hybridSearch returns nodes matching keyword
Library: keywordSearch finds name and description matches
Library: getAllAncestors returns empty for unknown entity
Library: getSchemaVersion returns SCHEMA_VERSION after initSchema
Library: migrate is idempotent on fresh install
Library.getInheritedProperties: returns predicates via type hierarchy
